revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Kamo no Akimasa | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} - {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}} | birth_date = {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 17 ({{ill|1520|ja|1520年}})?
{{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 16 ({{ill|1519|ja|1519年}})? | death_date = {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 4 ({{ill|1599|ja|1599年}}) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル}} | rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭}} | allegiance = {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|ja|後陽成天皇}}
{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|court noble|ja|公家}} and {{ill|onmyōji|ja|陰陽師}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} through the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560年}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599年}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599年}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] {{Infobox noble | name = Kamo no Akimasa | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} - {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}} | birth_date = {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 17 ({{ill|1520|ja|1520年}})?
{{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 16 ({{ill|1519|ja|1519年}})? | death_date = {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 4 ({{ill|1599|ja|1599年}}) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル}} | rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭}} | allegiance = {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|ja|後陽成天皇}}
{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|court noble|ja|公家|1=Kuge}} and {{ill|onmyōji|ja|陰陽師}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} through the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560年}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599年}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599年}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]][[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kamo revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Kamo no Akimasa | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} - {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}} | birth_date = {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 17 ({{ill|1520|ja|1520年}})?
{{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 16 ({{ill|1519|ja|1519年}})? | death_date = {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 4 ({{ill|1599|ja|1599年}}) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル}} | rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭}} | allegiance = {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|ja|後陽成天皇}}
{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|court noble|ja|公家|1=Kuge}} and {{ill|onmyōji|ja|陰陽師}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} through the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560年}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599年}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599年}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]][[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kamo revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Kamo no Akimasa | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} - {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}} | birth_date = {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 17 ({{ill|1520|ja|1520年}})?
{{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 16 ({{ill|1519|ja|1519年}})? | death_date = {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 4 ({{ill|1599|ja|1599年}}) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル}} | rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭}} | allegiance = {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|ja|後陽成天皇}}
{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|court noble|ja|公家|1=Kuge}} and {{ill|onmyōji|ja|陰陽師}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} through the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560年}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599年}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599年}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]][[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Kamo revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Kamo no Akimasa | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} - {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}} | birth_date = {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 17 ({{ill|1520|ja|1520年}})?
{{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 16 ({{ill|1519|ja|1519年}})? | death_date = {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 4 ({{ill|1599|ja|1599年}}) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル}} | rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭}} | allegiance = {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|ja|後陽成天皇}}
{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|court noble|ja|公家|1=Kuge}} and {{ill|onmyōji|ja|陰陽師}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} through the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560年}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599年}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599年}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]][[Category:Completion tier 2]] {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|court noble|ja|公家|1=Kuge}} and {{ill|onmyōji|ja|陰陽師}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} through the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560年}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599年}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577年}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599年}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]][[Category:Completion tier 2]] revision.comment: Text replacement - "7年" to "7th year "
revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Kamo no Akimasa | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} - {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}} | birth_date = {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 17 ({{ill|1520|ja|1520年}})?
{{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 16 ({{ill|1519|ja|1519年}})? | death_date = {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 4 ({{ill|1599|ja|1599年}}) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル}} | rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭}} | allegiance = {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|ja|後陽成天皇}}
{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|court noble|ja|公家|1=Kuge}} and {{ill|onmyōji|ja|陰陽師}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} through the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560年}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599年}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599年}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]][[Category:Completion tier {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|court noble|ja|公家|1=Kuge}} and {{ill|onmyōji|ja|陰陽師}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} through the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560th year }}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year }} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year }}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Kamo no Akimasa | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} - {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}} | birth_date = {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 17 ({{ill|1520|ja|1520th year }})?
{{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 16 ({{ill|1519|ja|1519th year }})? | death_date = {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 4 ({{ill|1599|ja|1599th year }}) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル}} | rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭}} | allegiance = {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|ja|後陽成天皇}}
{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|court noble|ja|公家|1=Kuge}} and {{ill|onmyōji|ja|陰陽師}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} through the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560th year }}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year }} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year }}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]][[Category:Completion tier {{Infobox noble | name = Kamo no Akimasa | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} - {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}} | birth_date = {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 17 ({{ill|1520|ja|1520th year }})?
{{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 16 ({{ill|1519|ja|1519th year }})? | death_date = {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 4 ({{ill|1599|ja|1599th year }}) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル}} | rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭}} | allegiance = {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|ja|後陽成天皇}}
{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|court noble|ja|公家|1=Kuge}} and {{ill|onmyōji|ja|陰陽師}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} through the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560th year }}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year }} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year }}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year }}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Kaga no Kōji family]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[en:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]]

He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン|12=draft|12=draft}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=draft|12=draft}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス|12=draft|12=draft}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|12=draft|12=draft}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|12=draft|12=draft}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560th year|12=draft|12=draft}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国|12=draft|12=draft}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|12=draft|12=draft}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=draft|12=draft}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|12=draft|12=draft}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|12=draft|12=draft}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス|12=draft|12=draft}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ|12=draft|12=draft}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=draft|12=draft}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Kaga no Kōji family]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[en:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]]

{{Infobox noble | name = Kamo no Akimasa | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} - {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|12=draft|12=draft}} | birth_date = {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 17 ({{ill|1520|ja|1520th year|12=draft|12=draft}})?
{{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 16 ({{ill|1519|ja|1519th year|12=draft|12=draft}})? | death_date = {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|12=draft|12=draft}}) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|12=draft|12=draft}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル|12=draft|12=draft}} | rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭|12=draft|12=draft}} | allegiance = {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|ja|後陽成天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}
{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼|12=draft|12=draft}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=draft|12=draft}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=draft|12=draft}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=draft|12=draft}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=draft|12=draft}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|court noble|ja|公家|1=Kuge|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|onmyōji|ja|陰陽師|12=draft|12=draft}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} through the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|12=draft|12=draft}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン|12=draft|12=draft}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=draft|12=draft}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス|12=draft|12=draft}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|12=draft|12=draft}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|12=draft|12=draft}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560th year|12=draft|12=draft}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国|12=draft|12=draft}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|12=draft|12=draft}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=draft|12=draft}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|12=draft|12=draft}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|12=draft|12=draft}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス|12=draft|12=draft}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ|12=draft|12=draft}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=draft|12=draft}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Kaga no Kōji family]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[en:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Kamo no Akimasa | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} - {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|12=draft|12=draft}} | birth_date = {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 17 ({{ill|1520|ja|1520th year|12=draft|12=draft}})?
{{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 16 ({{ill|1519|ja|1519th year|12=draft|12=draft}})? | death_date = {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|12=draft|12=draft}}) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|12=draft|12=draft}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル|12=draft|12=draft}} | rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭|12=draft|12=draft}} | allegiance = {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|ja|後陽成天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}
{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼|12=draft|12=draft}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=draft|12=draft}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=draft|12=draft}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=draft|12=draft}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=draft|12=draft}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|court noble|ja|公家|1=Kuge|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|onmyōji|ja|陰陽師|12=draft|12=draft}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} through the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|12=draft|12=draft}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン|12=draft|12=draft}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=draft|12=draft}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス|12=draft|12=draft}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|12=draft|12=draft}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|12=draft|12=draft}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560th year|12=draft|12=draft}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国|12=draft|12=draft}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|12=draft|12=draft}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=draft|12=draft}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|12=draft|12=draft}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|12=draft|12=draft}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス|12=draft|12=draft}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ|12=draft|12=draft}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=draft|12=draft}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Kaga no Kōji family]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[en:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Kamo no Akimasa | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} - {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|12=draft|12=draft}} | birth_date = {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 17 ({{ill|1520|ja|1520th year|12=draft|12=draft}})?
{{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 16 ({{ill|1519|ja|1519th year|12=draft|12=draft}})? | death_date = {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|12=draft|12=draft}}) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|12=draft|12=draft}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル|12=draft|12=draft}} | rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭|12=draft|12=draft}} | allegiance = {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|ja|後陽成天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}
{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼|12=draft|12=draft}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=draft|12=draft}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=draft|12=draft}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=draft|12=draft}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=draft|12=draft}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|court noble|ja|公家|1=Kuge|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|onmyōji|ja|陰陽師|12=draft|12=draft}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} through the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|12=draft|12=draft}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン|12=draft|12=draft}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=draft|12=draft}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス|12=draft|12=draft}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|12=draft|12=draft}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=draft|12=draft}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560th year|12=draft|12=draft}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国|12=draft|12=draft}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|12=draft|12=draft}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=draft|12=draft}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|12=draft|12=draft}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|12=draft|12=draft}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス|12=draft|12=draft}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ|12=draft|12=draft}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=draft|12=draft}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Kaga no Kōji family]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[en:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]]

Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス|12=draft|12=draft}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|12=draft|12=draft}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=draft|12=draft}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560th year|12=draft|12=draft}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国|12=draft|12=draft}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|12=draft|12=draft}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=draft|12=draft}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|12=draft|12=draft}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|12=draft|12=draft}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス|12=draft|12=draft}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ|12=draft|12=draft}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=draft|12=draft}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Kaga no Kōji family]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[en:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]]

He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Kaga no Kōji family]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[en:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]]

revision.comment: 39 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:賀茂在昌 up to rev 100764453
revision.text:
{{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 賀茂在昌 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = [[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]] - [[安土桃山時代]] | 生誕 = [[永正]]17年（[[1520年]]）?
[[永正]]16年（[[1519年]]）? | 死没 = [[慶長]]4年（[[1599年]]）[[8月 (旧暦)|8月]] | 改名 = | 別名 = | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = [[従四位|従四位下]]、[[陰陽寮|陰陽頭]] | 主君 = （[[後奈良天皇]]→）[[正親町天皇]]→[[後陽成天皇]]
[[織田信長]]→[[豊臣秀吉]]（→[[豊臣秀頼]]） | 氏族 = [[賀茂朝臣氏]][[嫡流]][[勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|勘解由小路家]] | 父母 = 父：[[勘解由小路在富]]、母：不明 | 兄弟 = '''在昌'''、養子：''[[勘解由小路在種|在種]]''、''[[勘解由小路在高|在高]]'' | 妻   = | 子 = [[メルショル (賀茂氏)|メルショル]]、'''[[勘解由小路在信|在信]]''' | 特記事項 = }} '''賀茂 在昌'''（かも の あきまさ）{{Efn2|史料によっては「有昌」、「有政」などと（「ありまさ」と読めるような）誤記がされている[[#tajima|但馬荒人]]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}が、『永禄元年記』によると、[[勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|勘解由小路家]]の[[諱#通字|通字]]「在」は「あき」と読むのが正しいとされる{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=43}}。}}は、[[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]から[[安土桃山時代]]にかけての[[公家]]・[[陰陽師]]。[[洗礼名]]は'''マノエル（Manoel）'''。[[正二位]]・[[勘解由小路在富]]の子。[[官位]]は[[従四位|従四位下]]・[[陰陽寮|陰陽頭]]。 == 未解明な点 == 賀茂在昌については[[史料]]が少なく、未だ実態が定かになっていない。 === 勘解由小路在昌 === 在昌は[[賀茂朝臣氏|賀茂朝臣姓]][[勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|勘解由小路家]]の子息であるが、[[家長|当主]]を嗣いだかどうかは定かでない{{Efn2|[[林淳]]は、''勘解由小路家の後継者になることはなかった''と述べている{{Sfn|林|2002|p=172}}。}}。「'''勘解由小路 在昌'''（かでのこうじ あきまさ）」と名乗った記録が無いためである{{Efn2|この時代、[[本姓]]（勘解由小路家の場合、賀茂朝臣が本姓となる）を名乗るケースは多いのであるが、「勘解由小路在昌」とする史料が現状一切発見されていないのは不可解である。}}。一方、在昌の息子である可能性がある[[勘解由小路在信|在信]]{{Efn2|[[村山修一]]は、在信は在昌の息子であると述べている{{Sfn|村山|2001|p=292}}。}}は、「勘解由小路在信」という名で史料に残っている『[[#keicho|慶長日件録]]』, [{{NDLDC|1041785/121}} p. 230.]。 === キリシタン陰陽師 === 在昌の最も特筆すべき点として、「'''[[キリシタン]]になった陰陽師'''」として知られる{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=43}}{{Sfn|西蓮寺|1996}}{{Sfn|斎藤|2014|pp=121f}}。しかし、キリシタン文献に記された「Manoel Aqui Marza」『日本イエズス会離脱者名簿』, [[#ebisawa1965|海老沢 1965]], p. 39.・「Aquimasadono」フロイス『[[#frois|日本史]]』, pp. 118f.といった人物と、日本側の史料に残る「賀茂在昌」が同一人物であるという確証は得られていない。ただ、時代的に符合し、[[ルイス・フロイス]]の書き遺した『[[フロイス日本史|日本史]]』に''「日本で最高の天文学者（Astrolog）の一人で公家でありはなはだ高貴なAquimasadonoという人物」''という記述がある{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=38}}[[#kiba1985|木場 1985]], p. 407.（1993, p. 175.）こと、これに該当し「アキマサ」という名前である人物は同時代に他に確認されていない{{Efn2|[[勘解由小路在宗]]の別名が「在政」である[[#okugesan_com|公卿類別譜]]ため、これに比定する説もある{{Sfn|神田|1962}}が、[[海老沢有道]]は、年代が合わないとして否定している{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=42}}。また、[[勘解由小路在理]]に比定する説もあるが、海老沢はこれもまた年代が合わない上に、''「在理」を「あきまさ」と主む明証がない''として否定している{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=44}}。}}ことから、同一人物である可能性は否定できない{{Sfn|海老沢|1965}}。当記事では、「Manoel Aqui Marza」・「Aquimasadono」と「賀茂在昌」が同一人物であるという仮定に基づいて記す。 == 経歴 == === 生まれ育ち === 在昌は、家祖[[賀茂忠行]]・[[賀茂保憲]]以来、[[朝廷 (日本)|朝廷]]の[[陰陽寮]]にて[[陰陽道]]ことに[[暦道]]を司ってきた[[陰陽道宗家]]の一翼・[[賀茂朝臣氏]][[嫡流]][[勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|勘解由小路家]]の当主・[[勘解由小路在富]]の子として生まれた。『[[歴名土代]]』『[[#ryakumyo|歴名土代]]』, p. 150.には、「故在富卿子実」{{efn2|「実子」ではなく「子実」と記されている点に注意。通常、「○○子　実△△」と書いて、「実は△△の子であり○○の養子になった」という旨を記す形式である。}}と記されており、何某かからの養子である可能性も指摘されている[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b2%ec%cc%d0%ba%df%be%bb 賀茂在昌]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}{{Efn2|木村純子は義子であるとして記している{{Sfn|木村|2012|p=197}}。}}。 没年と[[享年]]から逆算すると、 [[永正]]17年（[[1520年]]）あるいは永正16年（[[1519年]]）に生まれたことになる[[#tajima| 但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b2%ec%cc%d0%ba%df%be%bb%a4%ce%c0%b8%a4%de%a4%ec%a4%cb%a4%c4%a4%a4%a4%c6 賀茂在昌の生まれについて]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}。『耶蘇会士日本通信』の記述によると、[[山口市|山口]]の生まれという{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=38}}『[[#yaso|耶蘇会士日本通信]]』, pp. 10f.。山口には勘解由小路家の[[所領]]があり、当時山口を治めていた[[戦国大名]][[大内氏#周防大内氏|大内氏]]と勘解由小路家は密接な関わりがあった。 在富は、弟・[[勘解由小路在康]]の子であり甥にあたる[[勘解由小路在種|在種]]を養子としたが、天文20年（[[1551年]]）[[3月14日 (旧暦)|3月14日]]{{Efn2|『[[#ryakumyo|歴名土代]]』には「同（天文）廿三十四横死」とあるため、天文23年（[[1554年]]）[[10月4日 (旧暦)|10月4日]]没と読む説もある{{Sfn|林|2002|p=172}}{{Sfn|村山|1981|pp=363f}}が、『[[系図纂要]]』には「同廿年三ノ十四横死」と記されている。}}、21歳にて在種は在富の手によって「横死」させられた『[[#ryakumyo|歴名土代]]』, p. 105.[[#kiba1985|木場 1985]], p. 398.（1993, p. 166.）[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b4%aa%b2%f2%cd%b3%be%ae%cf%a9%ba%df%bc%ef%a1%a7%c9%d4%b6%f8%a4%ce%cd%dc%bb%d2 勘解由小路在種：不遇の養子]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}{{Efn2|『[[尊卑分脈]]』にある「父卿殺害之」という記述『[[#sonpi|尊卑分脈]]』, [{{NDLDC|991594/47}} p. 48].の「父」とは、養父[[勘解由小路在富|在富]]ではなく、実父[[勘解由小路在康|在康]]を指す可能性も指摘されている{{Sfn|村山|1981|pp=363f}}。}}。かくして在昌は、在富の唯一の息子となった。 === キリシタンとして === 在昌は、[[永禄]]2年[[12月 (旧暦)|12月]]（[[ユリウス暦]][[1560年]][[1月]]）、[[ガスパル・ヴィレラ]]らの上洛の折に逗留地を訪れ、[[宣教師#日本とキリスト教宣教師|伴天連]]達の[[天文学]]の知識に感銘を受けたことをきっかけとして、[[洗礼]]を受け[[キリシタン]]となった{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=38}}。 さらに永禄7年（[[1564年]]）末には、妻子を連れて京を出奔して、[[府内 (豊後国)|豊後府内]]に下向した。豊後に向かう道中、[[伊予国]]堀江に立ち寄った際、在昌の妻は産気付き、永禄7年[[12月6日 (旧暦)|12月6日]]（[[ユリウス暦]][[1565年]][[1月3日]]）、男児を出産フロイス『[[#frois|日本史]]』, pp. 214f.{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|pp=39f}}。この時の子が、のちの[[勘解由小路在信]]ではないかと考えられる[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b5%ad%bd%d2%a4%ce%b5%b4%a1%a2%a5%eb%a5%a4%a5%b9%a1%a6%a5%d5%a5%ed%a5%a4%a5%b9 記述の鬼、ルイス・フロイス]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}。折しもこの時、ルイス・フロイスと[[ルイス・デ・アルメイダ]]の両者が行き違いに豊後から[[堺]]に向かう道中であり{{Cite web|和書|url=https://blog.goo.ne.jp/shuichimaeda/e/1358da6fadb9fec99b5eb068174e709b|author=堺から日本へ！　世界へ！|title=キリシタン受容の構図－「茶の湯」文化の発見|accessdate=2019-10-6}}、在昌と出会い、部下を送って産後容態を悪くした在昌の妻を介抱した[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%a4%bd%a4%ce%c3%cb%a5%a2%a5%eb%a5%e1%a5%a4%a5%c0 その男アルメイダ]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}。在昌は信心の印として、11歳の息子[[メルショル (賀茂家)|メルショル]]（Melchior）を「神の奉仕に捧げる」すなわち[[修道士]]とする決意をした{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|pp=39f}}[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%a5%e1%a5%eb%a5%b7%a5%e7%a5%eb%a1%a7%c2%e8%b0%ec%a4%ce%c2%a9%bb%d2 メルショル：第一の息子]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}。メルショルは在昌の帰洛後も九州に留まり、天正8年（[[1580年]]）に[[イルマン]]（修道[[助祭]]）に[[叙階]]されたが、天正13年（[[1585年]]）には[[イエズス会]]を退会し、その3～4ヵ月後に[[天草市|天草]]で何者かによって暗殺された{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=40}}{{Efn2|フロイス『[[#frois|日本史]]』によると、[[口之津町|口之津]]で病死とある。}}。 === 嗣子問題 === 在昌が出奔した翌年の永禄8年（[[1565年]]）、在富は後継者が不在のまま、[[8月10日 (旧暦)|8月10日]]死去。嗣子がないため、[[土御門有春]]の四男・福寿丸（[[1553年]] - [[1575年]]・13歳）を[[勘解由小路在高]]として養子に入れて相続した[[#kiba1985|木場 1985]], pp. 401-406.（1993, pp. 169-174.）[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b4%aa%b2%f2%cd%b3%be%ae%cf%a9%ba%df%b9%e2 勘解由小路在高]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}が、在高は[[天正]]3年（[[1575年]]）に23歳で夭折してしまう。 これを受けて同年、有春の嗣子・[[土御門有脩|有脩]]の子である[[土御門久脩]]が16歳で勘解由小路在綱と改姓改名して、勘解由小路家を嗣ぐことになった[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b4%aa%b2%f2%cd%b3%be%ae%cf%a9%ba%df%b9%cb 勘解由小路在綱]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}。 しかしそれも束の間、天正5年（[[1577年]]）[[1月2日 (旧暦)|1月2日]]、久脩（在綱）の父・土御門有脩が死亡してしまう。これに伴い、唯一の嫡子である久脩改め在綱は、同年[[3月26日 (旧暦)|3月26日]]、土御門久脩へと復姓復名し、土御門家当主を嗣いだ。これは、在昌が京に呼び戻され、勘解由小路家を嗣ぐことになったためと思われる。同年[[閏月|閏]][[7月12日 (旧暦)|7月12日]]、在昌は[[従五位|従五位下]]{{Efn2|[[律令]]の[[官位相当制|官位相当]]では陰陽頭の[[位階]]に相当する。}}に叙位されている{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=45}}。 === 帰洛後の活動 === 『[[御湯殿上日記]]』天正8年（[[1580年]]）[[1月24日 (旧暦)|1月24日]]の記事に「あきまさ」という記述が登場するのが、日本側の[[史料#一次史料|一次史料]]における在昌の初出である。同[[2月17日 (旧暦)|2月17日]]の記事には、「おんようのかみあきまさ」と記述があることから、遅くともこの時点までに在昌は[[陰陽寮|陰陽頭]]に叙任されていたことが分かる[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b8%e6%c5%f2%c5%c2%be%e5%c6%fc%b5%ad 御湯殿上日記]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}。 天正9年（[[1581年]]）[[10月19日 (旧暦)|10月19日]]、[[従五位|従五位上]]に叙せられる{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=45}}『[[#ryakumyo|歴名土代]]』, p. 111.。 同年、いわゆる[[改暦#天正10年の例|天正十年改暦問題]]が起こり、翌天正10年（[[1582年]]）[[1月29日 (旧暦)|1月29日]]、在昌と土御門久脩は[[織田信長]]の居城・[[安土城]]に召され、共に[[具注暦|京暦]]側の代表者として[[三島暦]]の推進者と討論した{{Sfn|谷口|2007|pp=11-14}}[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%c5%b7%c0%b5%bd%bd%c7%af%b2%fe%ce%f1%cc%e4%c2%ea 天正十年改暦問題]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}。 天正18年（[[1590年]]）[[4月]]、[[方広寺]]大仏殿（[[京の大仏]]）の着工に先立つ[[地鎮祭]]を斎行。時の天下人・[[豊臣秀吉]]に重用されていたことがうかがえる[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%ba%df%be%bb%a4%c8%bd%a8%b5%c8 在昌と秀吉]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}。 [[慶長]]4年（[[1599年]]）[[3月26日 (旧暦)|3月26日]]には[[従四位|従四位下]]に叙せられる『[[#ryakumyo|歴名土代]]』, p. 59.{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=45}}。それからほどなく、慶長4年（[[1599年]]）[[8月 (旧暦)|8月]]、『[[歴名土代]]』によると80歳{{Efn2|『歴名土代』でも、『[[#gunsho|群書類従]]』所載（[{{NDLDC|2559257/63}} 当該箇所]）には81歳没とある。}}、『[[系図纂要]]』によると81歳にて没した{{Efn2|『[[系図纂要]]』が[[江戸時代]]末期の書であるのに対して、『[[歴名土代]]』は、同時代の人物で父・在富とも親交があった[[山科言継]][[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%ca%e4%b0%e4%a3%b2%a1%a7%bb%b3%b2%ca%b8%c0%b7%d1 補遺２：山科言継]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}およびその嗣子・[[山科言経|言経]]の編であり、史料価値が格段に高い。}}。 === 没後 === 在昌の帰洛によって、勘解由小路家の相続問題は一旦は解消したと思われたが、[[江戸時代]]初期、在昌の息子と思われる[[勘解由小路在信]][[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b4%aa%b2%f2%cd%b3%be%ae%cf%a9%ba%df%bf%ae%a1%a7%c2%e8%c6%f3%a4%ce%c2%a9%bb%d2 勘解由小路在信：第二の息子]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}の代に至って消息不明となり、賀茂氏勘解由小路家は完全に断絶した。在信に関する記録としては、在昌の記録が途絶えるのと前後して慶長3年（[[1598年]]）[[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]から『御湯殿上日記』に記述がみられ、慶長10年（[[1605年]]）[[10月11日 (旧暦)|10月11日]]、「勘解由小路[[修理職|修理大夫]]在信」という人物が[[堺]]にいるという『[[慶長日件録]]』の記述が最後である。 在信の記録が消えた時期と入れ替わるかのように、賀茂氏[[庶家|庶流]]{{Efn2|男系では元来[[阿倍氏#陰陽道安倍氏|安倍氏]]の系譜。}}で[[ならまち|奈良]]を拠点とする[[幸徳井家]]が勘解由小路家に代わって[[暦道]]の家柄として台頭し、[[元和 (日本)|元和]]4年（[[1618年]]）には[[幸徳井友景]]{{Efn2|[[柳生宗厳]]の甥であり、幸徳井家の養子となった。『[[#koutokui|幸徳井世系考訂本]]』によると、[[安井永順]]の子で柳生宗厳の養子とある。}}が同家では初の陰陽頭に任ぜられた『[[#koutokui|幸徳井世系考訂本]]』。 在昌と、その息子に当たると思われる[[勘解由小路在信]]については不明な点が多く、在昌の父・[[勘解由小路在富|在富]]の代で賀茂氏勘解由小路家は実質絶家したものと見なされることが多い[[#kiba1985|木場 1985]], p. 414.（1993, p. 183.）。 == 登場作品 == ;ゲーム *[[鬼武者Soul]]　配信：2012年10月19日～2017年3月30日 - 「勘解由小路在昌」（かでのこうじ ありまさ）、「賀茂在政」（かもの ありまさ）{{Efn2|本作では別人物で兄弟という設定となっている{{Cite news|title=ナインストーリーズ 森橋ビンゴ氏へのインタビューを掲載。「鬼武者Soul」のシナリオ執筆の裏話や，カプコン在籍時のエピソードを聞いてきた|work=4Gamer.net|url=https://www.4gamer.net/games/150/G015000/20130628015/|date=2013-06-28|accessdate=2019-10-15}}。}} *{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.asuka-zero.jp/detail_samurai/13105013|title=戦国アスカZERO|accessdate=2019-10-6}}　配信：2015年11月30日～ - 「[陰陽師]賀茂在昌」 ;小説 *{{Cite web|和書|url=http://kapelle.triona.jp/aquimarza.html|author=鳥位名久礼|title=十字架の陰陽師―キリシタン陰陽師・賀茂在昌―|date=2018-4-23|accessdate=2019-10-6}} * 武川佑│遠輪廻（[[オール読物]]） ;演劇 *[[錆色のアーマ#舞台|「錆色のアーマ」 -繋ぐ-]]{{Cite web|和書|url=https://25jigen.jp/work/6033|title=「錆色のアーマ」 -繋ぐ-|website=2.5ジゲン!!|accessdate=2021-06-03}}{{Cite interview|subject=玉城裕規|date=2019-5-2|interviewer=嶋田真己|title=【2.5次元】玉城裕規＆丘山晴己インタビュー　“逆2.5次元”作品「錆色のアーマ」 −繋ぐ−で「キャラクターを自分の色に染めていきたい」|url=https://tvfan.kyodo.co.jp/feature-interview/interview/25d-interview/1186758/|work=エンタメOVO|publisher=[[共同通信社]]|subject2=丘山晴己|language=ja|accessdate=2023-5-20}}　上演：2019年6月6日～30日 - 「賀茂在昌（かも・ありまさ）」 == 官歴 == 『[[歴名土代]]』による。 *[[天正]]5年（[[1577年]]） 閏7月12日：[[従五位|従五位下]] *天正9年（[[1581年]]） 10月19日：従五位上 *[[慶長]]4年（[[1599年]]） 3月26日：[[従四位|従四位下]]。8月：[[崩御#卒去|卒去]] == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[賀茂在昌]] to [[Kamo Akimasa]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text:
{{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 賀茂在昌 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = [[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]] - [[安土桃山時代]] | 生誕 = [[永正]]17年（[[1520年]]）?
[[永正]]16年（[[1519年]]）? | 死没 = [[慶長]]4年（[[1599年]]）[[8月 (旧暦)|8月]] | 改名 = | 別名 = | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = [[従四位|従四位下]]、[[陰陽寮|陰陽頭]] | 主君 = （[[後奈良天皇]]→）[[正親町天皇]]→[[後陽成天皇]]
[[織田信長]]→[[豊臣秀吉]]（→[[豊臣秀頼]]） | 氏族 = [[賀茂朝臣氏]][[嫡流]][[勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|勘解由小路家]] | 父母 = 父：[[勘解由小路在富]]、母：不明 | 兄弟 = '''在昌'''、養子：''[[勘解由小路在種|在種]]''、''[[勘解由小路在高|在高]]'' | 妻   = | 子 = [[メルショル (賀茂氏)|メルショル]]、'''[[勘解由小路在信|在信]]''' | 特記事項 = }} '''賀茂 在昌'''（かも の あきまさ）{{Efn2|史料によっては「有昌」、「有政」などと（「ありまさ」と読めるような）誤記がされている[[#tajima|但馬荒人]]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}が、『永禄元年記』によると、[[勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|勘解由小路家]]の[[諱#通字|通字]]「在」は「あき」と読むのが正しいとされる{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=43}}。}}は、[[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]から[[安土桃山時代]]にかけての[[公家]]・[[陰陽師]]。[[洗礼名]]は'''マノエル（Manoel）'''。[[正二位]]・[[勘解由小路在富]]の子。[[官位]]は[[従四位|従四位下]]・[[陰陽寮|陰陽頭]]。 == 未解明な点 == 賀茂在昌については[[史料]]が少なく、未だ実態が定かになっていない。 === 勘解由小路在昌 === 在昌は[[賀茂朝臣氏|賀茂朝臣姓]][[勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|勘解由小路家]]の子息であるが、[[家長|当主]]を嗣いだかどうかは定かでない{{Efn2|[[林淳]]は、''勘解由小路家の後継者になることはなかった''と述べている{{Sfn|林|2002|p=172}}。}}。「'''勘解由小路 在昌'''（かでのこうじ あきまさ）」と名乗った記録が無いためである{{Efn2|この時代、[[本姓]]（勘解由小路家の場合、賀茂朝臣が本姓となる）を名乗るケースは多いのであるが、「勘解由小路在昌」とする史料が現状一切発見されていないのは不可解である。}}。一方、在昌の息子である可能性がある[[勘解由小路在信|在信]]{{Efn2|[[村山修一]]は、在信は在昌の息子であると述べている{{Sfn|村山|2001|p=292}}。}}は、「勘解由小路在信」という名で史料に残っている『[[#keicho|慶長日件録]]』, [{{NDLDC|1041785/121}} p. 230.]。 === キリシタン陰陽師 === 在昌の最も特筆すべき点として、「'''[[キリシタン]]になった陰陽師'''」として知られる{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=43}}{{Sfn|西蓮寺|1996}}{{Sfn|斎藤|2014|pp=121f}}。しかし、キリシタン文献に記された「Manoel Aqui Marza」『日本イエズス会離脱者名簿』, [[#ebisawa1965|海老沢 1965]], p. 39.・「Aquimasadono」フロイス『[[#frois|日本史]]』, pp. 118f.といった人物と、日本側の史料に残る「賀茂在昌」が同一人物であるという確証は得られていない。ただ、時代的に符合し、[[ルイス・フロイス]]の書き遺した『[[フロイス日本史|日本史]]』に''「日本で最高の天文学者（Astrolog）の一人で公家でありはなはだ高貴なAquimasadonoという人物」''という記述がある{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=38}}[[#kiba1985|木場 1985]], p. 407.（1993, p. 175.）こと、これに該当し「アキマサ」という名前である人物は同時代に他に確認されていない{{Efn2|[[勘解由小路在宗]]の別名が「在政」である[[#okugesan_com|公卿類別譜]]ため、これに比定する説もある{{Sfn|神田|1962}}が、[[海老沢有道]]は、年代が合わないとして否定している{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=42}}。また、[[勘解由小路在理]]に比定する説もあるが、海老沢はこれもまた年代が合わない上に、''「在理」を「あきまさ」と主む明証がない''として否定している{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=44}}。}}ことから、同一人物である可能性は否定できない{{Sfn|海老沢|1965}}。当記事では、「Manoel Aqui Marza」・「Aquimasadono」と「賀茂在昌」が同一人物であるという仮定に基づいて記す。 == 経歴 == === 生まれ育ち === 在昌は、家祖[[賀茂忠行]]・[[賀茂保憲]]以来、[[朝廷 (日本)|朝廷]]の[[陰陽寮]]にて[[陰陽道]]ことに[[暦道]]を司ってきた[[陰陽道宗家]]の一翼・[[賀茂朝臣氏]][[嫡流]][[勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|勘解由小路家]]の当主・[[勘解由小路在富]]の子として生まれた。『[[歴名土代]]』『[[#ryakumyo|歴名土代]]』, p. 150.には、「故在富卿子実」{{efn2|「実子」ではなく「子実」と記されている点に注意。通常、「○○子　実△△」と書いて、「実は△△の子であり○○の養子になった」という旨を記す形式である。}}と記されており、何某かからの養子である可能性も指摘されている[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b2%ec%cc%d0%ba%df%be%bb 賀茂在昌]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}{{Efn2|木村純子は義子であるとして記している{{Sfn|木村|2012|p=197}}。}}。 没年と[[享年]]から逆算すると、 [[永正]]17年（[[1520年]]）あるいは永正16年（[[1519年]]）に生まれたことになる[[#tajima| 但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b2%ec%cc%d0%ba%df%be%bb%a4%ce%c0%b8%a4%de%a4%ec%a4%cb%a4%c4%a4%a4%a4%c6 賀茂在昌の生まれについて]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}。『耶蘇会士日本通信』の記述によると、[[山口市|山口]]の生まれという{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=38}}『[[#yaso|耶蘇会士日本通信]]』, pp. 10f.。山口には勘解由小路家の[[所領]]があり、当時山口を治めていた[[戦国大名]][[大内氏#周防大内氏|大内氏]]と勘解由小路家は密接な関わりがあった。 在富は、弟・[[勘解由小路在康]]の子であり甥にあたる[[勘解由小路在種|在種]]を養子としたが、天文20年（[[1551年]]）[[3月14日 (旧暦)|3月14日]]{{Efn2|『[[#ryakumyo|歴名土代]]』には「同（天文）廿三十四横死」とあるため、天文23年（[[1554年]]）[[10月4日 (旧暦)|10月4日]]没と読む説もある{{Sfn|林|2002|p=172}}{{Sfn|村山|1981|pp=363f}}が、『[[系図纂要]]』には「同廿年三ノ十四横死」と記されている。}}、21歳にて在種は在富の手によって「横死」させられた『[[#ryakumyo|歴名土代]]』, p. 105.[[#kiba1985|木場 1985]], p. 398.（1993, p. 166.）[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b4%aa%b2%f2%cd%b3%be%ae%cf%a9%ba%df%bc%ef%a1%a7%c9%d4%b6%f8%a4%ce%cd%dc%bb%d2 勘解由小路在種：不遇の養子]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}{{Efn2|『[[尊卑分脈]]』にある「父卿殺害之」という記述『[[#sonpi|尊卑分脈]]』, [{{NDLDC|991594/47}} p. 48].の「父」とは、養父[[勘解由小路在富|在富]]ではなく、実父[[勘解由小路在康|在康]]を指す可能性も指摘されている{{Sfn|村山|1981|pp=363f}}。}}。かくして在昌は、在富の唯一の息子となった。 === キリシタンとして === 在昌は、[[永禄]]2年[[12月 (旧暦)|12月]]（[[ユリウス暦]][[1560年]][[1月]]）、[[ガスパル・ヴィレラ]]らの上洛の折に逗留地を訪れ、[[宣教師#日本とキリスト教宣教師|伴天連]]達の[[天文学]]の知識に感銘を受けたことをきっかけとして、[[洗礼]]を受け[[キリシタン]]となった{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=38}}。 さらに永禄7年（[[1564年]]）末には、妻子を連れて京を出奔して、[[府内 (豊後国)|豊後府内]]に下向した。豊後に向かう道中、[[伊予国]]堀江に立ち寄った際、在昌の妻は産気付き、永禄7年[[12月6日 (旧暦)|12月6日]]（[[ユリウス暦]][[1565年]][[1月3日]]）、男児を出産フロイス『[[#frois|日本史]]』, pp. 214f.{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|pp=39f}}。この時の子が、のちの[[勘解由小路在信]]ではないかと考えられる[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b5%ad%bd%d2%a4%ce%b5%b4%a1%a2%a5%eb%a5%a4%a5%b9%a1%a6%a5%d5%a5%ed%a5%a4%a5%b9 記述の鬼、ルイス・フロイス]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}。折しもこの時、ルイス・フロイスと[[ルイス・デ・アルメイダ]]の両者が行き違いに豊後から[[堺]]に向かう道中であり{{Cite web|和書|url=https://blog.goo.ne.jp/shuichimaeda/e/1358da6fadb9fec99b5eb068174e709b|author=堺から日本へ！　世界へ！|title=キリシタン受容の構図－「茶の湯」文化の発見|accessdate=2019-10-6}}、在昌と出会い、部下を送って産後容態を悪くした在昌の妻を介抱した[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%a4%bd%a4%ce%c3%cb%a5%a2%a5%eb%a5%e1%a5%a4%a5%c0 その男アルメイダ]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}。在昌は信心の印として、11歳の息子[[メルショル (賀茂家)|メルショル]]（Melchior）を「神の奉仕に捧げる」すなわち[[修道士]]とする決意をした{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|pp=39f}}[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%a5%e1%a5%eb%a5%b7%a5%e7%a5%eb%a1%a7%c2%e8%b0%ec%a4%ce%c2%a9%bb%d2 メルショル：第一の息子]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}。メルショルは在昌の帰洛後も九州に留まり、天正8年（[[1580年]]）に[[イルマン]]（修道[[助祭]]）に[[叙階]]されたが、天正13年（[[1585年]]）には[[イエズス会]]を退会し、その3～4ヵ月後に[[天草市|天草]]で何者かによって暗殺された{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=40}}{{Efn2|フロイス『[[#frois|日本史]]』によると、[[口之津町|口之津]]で病死とある。}}。 === 嗣子問題 === 在昌が出奔した翌年の永禄8年（[[1565年]]）、在富は後継者が不在のまま、[[8月10日 (旧暦)|8月10日]]死去。嗣子がないため、[[土御門有春]]の四男・福寿丸（[[1553年]] - [[1575年]]・13歳）を[[勘解由小路在高]]として養子に入れて相続した[[#kiba1985|木場 1985]], pp. 401-406.（1993, pp. 169-174.）[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b4%aa%b2%f2%cd%b3%be%ae%cf%a9%ba%df%b9%e2 勘解由小路在高]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}が、在高は[[天正]]3年（[[1575年]]）に23歳で夭折してしまう。 これを受けて同年、有春の嗣子・[[土御門有脩|有脩]]の子である[[土御門久脩]]が16歳で勘解由小路在綱と改姓改名して、勘解由小路家を嗣ぐことになった[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b4%aa%b2%f2%cd%b3%be%ae%cf%a9%ba%df%b9%cb 勘解由小路在綱]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}。 しかしそれも束の間、天正5年（[[1577年]]）[[1月2日 (旧暦)|1月2日]]、久脩（在綱）の父・土御門有脩が死亡してしまう。これに伴い、唯一の嫡子である久脩改め在綱は、同年[[3月26日 (旧暦)|3月26日]]、土御門久脩へと復姓復名し、土御門家当主を嗣いだ。これは、在昌が京に呼び戻され、勘解由小路家を嗣ぐことになったためと思われる。同年[[閏月|閏]][[7月12日 (旧暦)|7月12日]]、在昌は[[従五位|従五位下]]{{Efn2|[[律令]]の[[官位相当制|官位相当]]では陰陽頭の[[位階]]に相当する。}}に叙位されている{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=45}}。 === 帰洛後の活動 === 『[[御湯殿上日記]]』天正8年（[[1580年]]）[[1月24日 (旧暦)|1月24日]]の記事に「あきまさ」という記述が登場するのが、日本側の[[史料#一次史料|一次史料]]における在昌の初出である。同[[2月17日 (旧暦)|2月17日]]の記事には、「おんようのかみあきまさ」と記述があることから、遅くともこの時点までに在昌は[[陰陽寮|陰陽頭]]に叙任されていたことが分かる[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b8%e6%c5%f2%c5%c2%be%e5%c6%fc%b5%ad 御湯殿上日記]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}。 天正9年（[[1581年]]）[[10月19日 (旧暦)|10月19日]]、[[従五位|従五位上]]に叙せられる{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=45}}『[[#ryakumyo|歴名土代]]』, p. 111.。 同年、いわゆる[[改暦#天正10年の例|天正十年改暦問題]]が起こり、翌天正10年（[[1582年]]）[[1月29日 (旧暦)|1月29日]]、在昌と土御門久脩は[[織田信長]]の居城・[[安土城]]に召され、共に[[具注暦|京暦]]側の代表者として[[三島暦]]の推進者と討論した{{Sfn|谷口|2007|pp=11-14}}[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%c5%b7%c0%b5%bd%bd%c7%af%b2%fe%ce%f1%cc%e4%c2%ea 天正十年改暦問題]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}。 天正18年（[[1590年]]）[[4月]]、[[方広寺]]大仏殿（[[京の大仏]]）の着工に先立つ[[地鎮祭]]を斎行。時の天下人・[[豊臣秀吉]]に重用されていたことがうかがえる[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%ba%df%be%bb%a4%c8%bd%a8%b5%c8 在昌と秀吉]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}。 [[慶長]]4年（[[1599年]]）[[3月26日 (旧暦)|3月26日]]には[[従四位|従四位下]]に叙せられる『[[#ryakumyo|歴名土代]]』, p. 59.{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=45}}。それからほどなく、慶長4年（[[1599年]]）[[8月 (旧暦)|8月]]、『[[歴名土代]]』によると80歳{{Efn2|『歴名土代』でも、『[[#gunsho|群書類従]]』所載（[{{NDLDC|2559257/63}} 当該箇所]）には81歳没とある。}}、『[[系図纂要]]』によると81歳にて没した{{Efn2|『[[系図纂要]]』が[[江戸時代]]末期の書であるのに対して、『[[歴名土代]]』は、同時代の人物で父・在富とも親交があった[[山科言継]][[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%ca%e4%b0%e4%a3%b2%a1%a7%bb%b3%b2%ca%b8%c0%b7%d1 補遺２：山科言継]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}およびその嗣子・[[山科言経|言経]]の編であり、史料価値が格段に高い。}}。 === 没後 === 在昌の帰洛によって、勘解由小路家の相続問題は一旦は解消したと思われたが、[[江戸時代]]初期、在昌の息子と思われる[[勘解由小路在信]][[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b4%aa%b2%f2%cd%b3%be%ae%cf%a9%ba%df%bf%ae%a1%a7%c2%e8%c6%f3%a4%ce%c2%a9%bb%d2 勘解由小路在信：第二の息子]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}の代に至って消息不明となり、賀茂氏勘解由小路家は完全に断絶した。在信に関する記録としては、在昌の記録が途絶えるのと前後して慶長3年（[[1598年]]）[[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]から『御湯殿上日記』に記述がみられ、慶長10年（[[1605年]]）[[10月11日 (旧暦)|10月11日]]、「勘解由小路[[修理職|修理大夫]]在信」という人物が[[堺]]にいるという『[[慶長日件録]]』の記述が最後である。 在信の記録が消えた時期と入れ替わるかのように、賀茂氏[[庶家|庶流]]{{Efn2|男系では元来[[阿倍氏#陰陽道安倍氏|安倍氏]]の系譜。}}で[[ならまち|奈良]]を拠点とする[[幸徳井家]]が勘解由小路家に代わって[[暦道]]の家柄として台頭し、[[元和 (日本)|元和]]4年（[[1618年]]）には[[幸徳井友景]]{{Efn2|[[柳生宗厳]]の甥であり、幸徳井家の養子となった。『[[#koutokui|幸徳井世系考訂本]]』によると、[[安井永順]]の子で柳生宗厳の養子とある。}}が同家では初の陰陽頭に任ぜられた『[[#koutokui|幸徳井世系考訂本]]』。 在昌と、その息子に当たると思われる[[勘解由小路在信]]については不明な点が多く、在昌の父・[[勘解由小路在富|在富]]の代で賀茂氏勘解由小路家は実質絶家したものと見なされることが多い[[#kiba1985|木場 1985]], p. 414.（1993, p. 183.）。 == 登場作品 == ;ゲーム *[[鬼武者Soul]]　配信：2012年10月19日～2017年3月30日 - 「勘解由小路在昌」（かでのこうじ ありまさ）、「賀茂在政」（かもの ありまさ）{{Efn2|本作では別人物で兄弟という設定となっている{{Cite news|title=ナインストーリーズ 森橋ビンゴ氏へのインタビューを掲載。「鬼武者Soul」のシナリオ執筆の裏話や，カプコン在籍時のエピソードを聞いてきた|work=4Gamer.net|url=https://www.4gamer.net/games/150/G015000/20130628015/|date=2013-06-28|accessdate=2019-10-15}}。}} *{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.asuka-zero.jp/detail_samurai/13105013|title=戦国アスカZERO|accessdate=2019-10-6}}　配信：2015年11月30日～ - 「[陰陽師]賀茂在昌」 ;小説 *{{Cite web|和書|url=http://kapelle.triona.jp/aquimarza.html|author=鳥位名久礼|title=十字架の陰陽師―キリシタン陰陽師・賀茂在昌―|date=2018-4-23|accessdate=2019-10-6}} * 武川佑│遠輪廻（[[オール読物]]） ;演劇 *[[錆色のアーマ#舞台|「錆色のアーマ」 -繋ぐ-]]{{Cite web|和書|url=https://25jigen.jp/work/6033|title=「錆色のアーマ」 -繋ぐ-|website=2.5ジゲン!!|accessdate=2021-06-03}}{{Cite interview|subject=玉城裕規|date=2019-5-2|interviewer=嶋田真己|title=【2.5次元】玉城裕規＆丘山晴己インタビュー　“逆2.5次元”作品「錆色のアーマ」 −繋ぐ−で「キャラクターを自分の色に染めていきたい」|url=https://tvfan.kyodo.co.jp/feature-interview/interview/25d-interview/1186758/|work=エンタメOVO|publisher=[[共同通信社]]|subject2=丘山晴己|language=ja|accessdate=2023-5-20}}　上演：2019年6月6日～30日 - 「賀茂在昌（かも・ありまさ）」 == 官歴 == 『[[歴名土代]]』による。 *[[天正]]5年（[[1577年]]） 閏7月12日：[[従五位|従五位下]] *天正9年（[[1581年]]） 10月19日：従五位上 *[[慶長]]4年（[[1599年]]） 3月26日：[[従四位|従四位下]]。8月：[[崩御#卒去|卒去]] == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 ===
