{{Infobox noble | name = Kamo no Akimasa | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} - {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}} | birth_date = {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 17 ({{ill|1520|ja|1520th year}})?
{{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 16 ({{ill|1519|ja|1519th year}})? | death_date = {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 4 ({{ill|1599|ja|1599th year}}) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル}} | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭}} | allegiance = {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|ja|後陽成天皇}}
{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|court noble|ja|公家|1=Kuge}} and {{ill|onmyōji|ja|陰陽師}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} through the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560th year}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Kaga no Kōji family]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[en:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]] {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{Infobox noble | name = Kamo no Akimasa | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | birth_date = {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 17 ({{ill|1520|ja|1520th year|qq=draft|qq=draft}})?
{{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 16 ({{ill|1519|ja|1519th year|qq=draft|qq=draft}})? | death_date = {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 4 ({{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | allegiance = {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|ja|後陽成天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|qq=draft|qq=draft}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|qq=draft|qq=draft}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|court noble|ja|公家|1=Kuge|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|onmyōji|ja|陰陽師|qq=draft|qq=draft}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} through the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン|qq=draft|qq=draft}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス|qq=draft|qq=draft}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|qq=draft|qq=draft}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560th year|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国|qq=draft|qq=draft}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|qq=draft|qq=draft}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|qq=draft|qq=draft}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|qq=draft|qq=draft}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Kaga no Kōji family]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[en:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]]

His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1577|qq=}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1599|qq=}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Luis Frois|qq=}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gaspard Vilela|qq=}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Kaga no Kōji family]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[en:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]]

{{Infobox noble | name = Kamo no Akimasa | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=}} - {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuchi-Momoyama period|qq=}} | birth_date = {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eishō|qq=}} 17 ({{ill|1520|ja|1520th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1520|qq=}})?
{{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eishō|qq=}} 16 ({{ill|1519|ja|1519th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1519|qq=}})? | death_date = {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 4 ({{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1599|qq=}}) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (lunar calendar)|qq=}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manoel|qq=}} | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Head of the Onmyōryō|qq=}} | allegiance = {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Nara|qq=}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōgimachi|qq=}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|ja|後陽成天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Yōzei|qq=}}
{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Nobunaga|qq=}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyori|qq=}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritane|qq=}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|qq=}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Melchior (Kamo clan)|qq=}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|court noble|ja|公家|1=Kuge|qq=|1=Kuge|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/court noble|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|qq=}} and {{ill|onmyōji|ja|陰陽師|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/onmyōji|qq=}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=}} through the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuchi-Momoyama period|qq=}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan|qq=}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Luis Frois|qq=}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|qq=}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1560|qq=}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bungo Province|qq=}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1599|qq=}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1577|qq=}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1599|qq=}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Luis Frois|qq=}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gaspard Vilela|qq=}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Kaga no Kōji family]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kamo Akimasa]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[en:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]]

{{Infobox noble | name = Kamo no Akimasa | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=}} - {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuchi-Momoyama period|qq=}} | birth_date = {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eishō|qq=}} 17 ({{ill|1520|ja|1520th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1520|qq=}})?
{{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eishō|qq=}} 16 ({{ill|1519|ja|1519th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1519|qq=}})? | death_date = {{ill|Keichō|1=Keichō|2=ja|3=慶長|ja|慶長|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō|qq=}} 4 ({{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1599|qq=}}) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (lunar calendar)|qq=}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manoel|qq=}} | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Head of the Onmyōryō|qq=}} | allegiance = {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Nara|qq=}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōgimachi|qq=}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|ja|後陽成天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Yōzei|qq=}}
{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Nobunaga|qq=}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|ja|豊臣秀頼|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyori|qq=}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritane|qq=}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|qq=}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Melchior (Kamo clan)|qq=}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|court noble|ja|公家|1=Kuge|qq=|1=Kuge|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/court noble|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|qq=}} and {{ill|onmyōji|ja|陰陽師|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/onmyōji|qq=}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代 (日本)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=}} through the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuchi-Momoyama period|qq=}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan|qq=}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Luis Frois|qq=}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|qq=}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|ja|1560th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1560|qq=}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|ja|豊後国|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bungo Province|qq=}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1599|qq=}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|ja|1577th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1577|qq=}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|ja|1599th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1599|qq=}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luis Frois|ja|ルイス・フロイス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Luis Frois|qq=}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspard Vilela|ja|ガスパル・ヴィレラ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gaspard Vilela|qq=}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Kaga no Kōji family]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kamo Akimasa]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[en:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]]

{{Infobox noble | name = Kamo no Akimasa | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = [[:en:Sengoku period|Sengoku period]] - [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]] | birth_date = [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 17 ([[:en:1520|1520]])?
[[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 16 ([[:en:1519|1519]])? | death_date = [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4 ([[:en:1599|1599]]) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (lunar calendar)|qq=}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manoel|qq=}} | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Head of the Onmyōryō|qq=}} | allegiance = [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Emperor Go-Nara]] → [[:en:Emperor Ōgimachi|Emperor Ōgimachi]] → [[:en:Emperor Go-Yōzei|Emperor Go-Yōzei]]

Historical sources such as [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]]' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|qq=}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In [[:en:1560|1560]], Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to [[:en:Bungo Province|Bungo Province]] with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in [[:en:1599|1599]] at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Kaga no Kōji family]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kamo Akimasa]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[en:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]]

[[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 16 ([[:en:1519|1519]])? | death_date = [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4 ([[:en:1599|1599]]) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (lunar calendar)|qq=}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manoel|qq=}} | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Head of the Onmyōryō|qq=}} | allegiance = [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Emperor Go-Nara]] → [[:en:Emperor Ōgimachi|Emperor Ōgimachi]] → [[:en:Emperor Go-Yōzei|Emperor Go-Yōzei]]
[[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] → [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (→ [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]]) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritane|qq=}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|qq=}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Melchior (Kamo clan)|qq=}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a [[:en:Kuge|Kuge]] and [[:en:Onmyōji|onmyōji]] active during the [[:en:Sengoku period|Sengoku period]] through the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. He was baptized as a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]] under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]]' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|qq=}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In [[:en:1560|1560]], Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to [[:en:Bungo Province|Bungo Province]] with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in [[:en:1599|1599]] at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Kaga no Kōji family]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kamo Akimasa]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[en:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:キリシタン]] [[Category:勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)]] [[Category:室町・安土桃山時代の公家]]

He was baptized as a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]] under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]]' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|qq=}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In [[:en:1560|1560]], Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to [[:en:Bungo Province|Bungo Province]] with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in [[:en:1599|1599]] at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Kaga no Kōji family]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kamo Akimasa]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[en:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:キリシタン]] [[Category:勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)]] [[Category:室町・安土桃山時代の公家]] [[Category:従四位下受位者]] [[Category:賀茂朝臣氏]]

He was baptized as a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]] under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]]' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In [[:en:1560|1560]], Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to [[:en:Bungo Province|Bungo Province]] with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in [[:en:1599|1599]] at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kamo Akimasa]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kamo Akimasa]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:キリシタン]] [[Category:勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)]] [[Category:室町・安土桃山時代の公家]] [[Category:従四位下受位者]] [[Category:賀茂朝臣氏]]

[[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] → [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (→ [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]]) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Melchior (Kamo clan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a [[:en:Kuge|Kuge]] and [[:en:Onmyōji|onmyōji]] active during the [[:en:Sengoku period|Sengoku period]] through the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. He was baptized as a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]] under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]]' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In [[:en:1560|1560]], Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to [[:en:Bungo Province|Bungo Province]] with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in [[:en:1599|1599]] at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:キリシタン]] [[Category:勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)]] [[Category:室町・安土桃山時代の公家]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:賀茂朝臣氏]]

[[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] → [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (→ [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]]) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Melchior (Kamo clan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a [[:en:Kuge|Kuge]] and [[:en:Onmyōji|onmyōji]] active during the [[:en:Sengoku period|Sengoku period]] through the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. He was baptized as a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]] under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]]' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In [[:en:1560|1560]], Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to [[:en:Bungo Province|Bungo Province]] with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in [[:en:1599|1599]] at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]]

[[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] → [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (→ [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]]) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Melchior (Kamo clan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a [[:en:Kuge|Kuge]] and [[:en:Onmyōji|onmyōji]] active during the [[:en:Sengoku period|Sengoku period]] through the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. He was baptized as a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]] under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]]' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In [[:en:1560|1560]], Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to [[:en:Bungo Province|Bungo Province]] with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in [[:en:1599|1599]] at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]]

[[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 16 ([[:en:1519|1519]])? | death_date = [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4 ([[:en:1599|1599]]) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (lunar calendar)|qq=|1=8th month|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q841072}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manoel|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Head of the Onmyōryō|qq=|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658275}} | allegiance = [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Emperor Go-Nara]] → [[:en:Emperor Ōgimachi|Emperor Ōgimachi]] → [[:en:Emperor Go-Yōzei|Emperor Go-Yōzei]]
[[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] → [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (→ [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]]) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Melchior (Kamo clan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a [[:en:Kuge|Kuge]] and [[:en:Onmyōji|onmyōji]] active during the [[:en:Sengoku period|Sengoku period]] through the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. He was baptized as a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]] under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]]' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史|1=history of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q130436}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In [[:en:1560|1560]], Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to [[:en:Bungo Province|Bungo Province]] with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in [[:en:1599|1599]] at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|qq=|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]]

His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|qq=|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] }} [[sn:Kamo Akimasa]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[sn:amo Akimasa]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}}

[[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 16 ([[:en:1519|1519]])? | death_date = [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4 ([[:en:1599|1599]]) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (lunar calendar)|qq=|1=8th month|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q841072}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manoel|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Head of the Onmyōryō|qq=|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658275}} | allegiance = [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Emperor Go-Nara]] → [[:en:Emperor Ōgimachi|Emperor Ōgimachi]] → [[:en:Emperor Go-Yōzei|Emperor Go-Yōzei]]
[[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] → [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (→ [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]]) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Melchior (Kamo clan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579622}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a [[:en:Kuge|Kuge]] and [[:en:Onmyōji|onmyōji]] active during the [[:en:Sengoku period|Sengoku period]] through the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. He was baptized as a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]] under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]]' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史|1=history of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q130436}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In [[:en:1560|1560]], Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to [[:en:Bungo Province|Bungo Province]] with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in [[:en:1599|1599]] at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|qq=|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] }} [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}}

Historical sources such as [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]]' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史|1=history of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q130436}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In [[:en:1560|1560]], Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to [[:en:Bungo Province|Bungo Province]] with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in [[:en:1599|1599]] at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|qq=|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] }} [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}}
