[[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 16 ([[:en:1519|1519]])? | death_date = [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4 ([[:en:1599|1599]]) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (lunar calendar)|qq=|1=8th month|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q841072}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manoel|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Head of the Onmyōryō|qq=|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658275}} | allegiance = [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Emperor Go-Nara]] → [[:en:Emperor Ōgimachi|Emperor Ōgimachi]] → [[:en:Emperor Go-Yōzei|Emperor Go-Yōzei]]
[[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] → [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (→ [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]]) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Melchior (Kamo clan)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579622}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a [[:en:Kuge|Kuge]] and [[:en:Onmyōji|onmyōji]] active during the [[:en:Sengoku period|Sengoku period]] through the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. He was baptized as a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]] under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]]' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史|1=history of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q130436}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In [[:en:1560|1560]], Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to [[:en:Bungo Province|Bungo Province]] with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in [[:en:1599|1599]] at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|qq=|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|qq=|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] }} [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}}

[[ja:賀茂在昌]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=1520|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|father={{ill|Q11400104|WD=Q11400104}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q73111790]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:19, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q73111790]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox noble | name = Kamo no Akimasa | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = [[:en:Sengoku period|Sengoku period]] - [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]] | birth_date = [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 17 ([[:en:1520|1520]])?
[[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 16 ([[:en:1519|1519]])? | death_date = [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4 ([[:en:1599|1599]]) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (lunar calendar)|1=8th month|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q841072}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manoel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Head of the Onmyōryō|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658275}} | allegiance = [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Emperor Go-Nara]] → [[:en:Emperor Ōgimachi|Emperor Ōgimachi]] → [[:en:Emperor Go-Yōzei|Emperor Go-Yōzei]]
[[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] → [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (→ [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]]) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579622}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a [[:en:Kuge|Kuge]] and [[:en:Onmyōji|onmyōji]] active during the [[:en:Sengoku period|Sengoku period]] through the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. He was baptized as a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]] under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]]' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史|1=history of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q130436}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In [[:en:1560|1560]], Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to [[:en:Bungo Province|Bungo Province]] with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in [[:en:1599|1599]] at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] }} [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}}

[[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 16 ([[:en:1519|1519]])? | death_date = [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4 ([[:en:1599|1599]]) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (lunar calendar)|1=8th month|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q841072}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manoel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Head of the Onmyōryō|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658275}} | allegiance = [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Emperor Go-Nara]] → [[:en:Emperor Ōgimachi|Emperor Ōgimachi]] → [[:en:Emperor Go-Yōzei|Emperor Go-Yōzei]]
[[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] → [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (→ [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]]) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579622}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a [[:en:Kuge|Kuge]] and [[:en:Onmyōji|onmyōji]] active during the [[:en:Sengoku period|Sengoku period]] through the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. He was baptized as a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]] under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]]' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史|1=history of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q130436}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In [[:en:1560|1560]], Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to [[:en:Bungo Province|Bungo Province]] with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in [[:en:1599|1599]] at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] }} [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] }} [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

[[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 16 ([[:en:1519|1519]])? | death_date = [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4 ([[:en:1599|1599]]) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (lunar calendar)|1=8th month|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q841072}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manoel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Head of the Onmyōryō|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658275}} | allegiance = [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Emperor Go-Nara]] → [[:en:Emperor Ōgimachi|Emperor Ōgimachi]] → [[:en:Emperor Go-Yōzei|Emperor Go-Yōzei]]
[[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] → [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (→ [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]]) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579622}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a [[:en:Kuge|Kuge]] and [[:en:Onmyōji|onmyōji]] active during the [[:en:Sengoku period|Sengoku period]] through the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. He was baptized as a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]] under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]]' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史|1=history of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q130436}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In [[:en:1560|1560]], Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to [[:en:Bungo Province|Bungo Province]] with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in [[:en:1599|1599]] at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] }} [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] }} [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

[[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 16 ([[:en:1519|1519]])? | death_date = [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4 ([[:en:1599|1599]]) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (lunar calendar)|1=8th month|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q841072}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manoel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Head of the Onmyōryō|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658275}} | allegiance = [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Emperor Go-Nara]] → [[:en:Emperor Ōgimachi|Emperor Ōgimachi]] → [[:en:Emperor Go-Yōzei|Emperor Go-Yōzei]]
[[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] → [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (→ [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]]) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579622}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a [[:en:Kuge|Kuge]] and [[:en:Onmyōji|onmyōji]] active during the [[:en:Sengoku period|Sengoku period]] through the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. He was baptized as a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]] under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]]' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史|1=history of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q130436}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In [[:en:1560|1560]], Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to [[:en:Bungo Province|Bungo Province]] with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in [[:en:1599|1599]] at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] }} [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] }} [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

[[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 16 ([[:en:1519|1519]])? | death_date = [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4 ([[:en:1599|1599]]) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (lunar calendar)|1=8th month|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q841072}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manoel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Head of the Onmyōryō|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658275}} | allegiance = [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Emperor Go-Nara]] → [[:en:Emperor Ōgimachi|Emperor Ōgimachi]] → [[:en:Emperor Go-Yōzei|Emperor Go-Yōzei]]
[[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] → [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (→ [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]]) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579622}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a [[:en:Kuge|Kuge]] and [[:en:Onmyōji|onmyōji]] active during the [[:en:Sengoku period|Sengoku period]] through the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. He was baptized as a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]] under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]]' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史|1=history of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q130436}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In [[:en:1560|1560]], Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to [[:en:Bungo Province|Bungo Province]] with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in [[:en:1599|1599]] at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[ja:賀茂在昌]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}} [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[ja:賀茂在昌]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}} [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

[[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 16 ([[:en:1519|1519]])? | death_date = [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4 ([[:en:1599|1599]]) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (lunar calendar)|1=8th month|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q841072}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manoel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Head of the Onmyōryō|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658275}} | allegiance = [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Emperor Go-Nara]] → [[:en:Emperor Ōgimachi|Emperor Ōgimachi]] → [[:en:Emperor Go-Yōzei|Emperor Go-Yōzei]]
[[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] → [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (→ [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyori|Toyotomi Hideyori]]) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579622}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a [[:en:Kuge|Kuge]] and [[:en:Onmyōji|onmyōji]] active during the [[:en:Sengoku period|Sengoku period]] through the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. He was baptized as a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]] under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]]' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史|1=history of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q130436}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In [[:en:1560|1560]], Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to [[:en:Bungo Province|Bungo Province]] with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in [[:en:1599|1599]] at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * [[:en:1577|1577]]: Junior Fifth Rank * [[:en:1599|1599]]: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * [[:en:Luís Fróis|Luis Frois]], *History of Japan* * [[:en:Gaspar Vilela|Gaspard Vilela]], *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[ja:賀茂在昌]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}} [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|en|Kirishitan|WD=Q718714|lt=Kirishitan}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luís Fróis|en|Luís Fróis|WD=Q553687|lt=Luis Frois}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史|1=history of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q130436}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|en|1560|WD=Q6613|lt=1560}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|en|Bungo Province|WD=Q864148|lt=Bungo Province}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|en|1577|WD=Q6704|lt=1577}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luís Fróis|en|Luís Fróis|WD=Q553687|lt=Luis Frois}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspar Vilela|en|Gaspar Vilela|WD=Q11295956|lt=Gaspard Vilela}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:賀茂在昌]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}} [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

[[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] [[ja:賀茂在昌]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=1520|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|father={{ill|Q11400104|WD=Q11400104}}}} {{Infobox noble | name = Kamo no Akimasa | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = {{ill|Sengoku period|en|Sengoku period|WD=Q204023|lt=Sengoku period}} - {{ill|Azuchi–Momoyama period|en|Azuchi–Momoyama period|WD=Q319531|lt=Azuchi-Momoyama period}} | birth_date = {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō}} 17 ({{ill|1520|en|1520|WD=Q6284|lt=1520}})?
{{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō}} 16 ({{ill|1519|en|1519|WD=Q6278|lt=1519}})? | death_date = {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 4 ({{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599}}) {{ill|August (lunar calendar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (lunar calendar)|1=8th month|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q841072}} | other_names = {{ill|Manoel|ja|マノエル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Manoel|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}}; {{ill|Head of the Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Head of the Onmyōryō|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658275}} | allegiance = {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|en|Emperor Go-Nara|WD=Q349467|lt=Emperor Go-Nara}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|en|Emperor Ōgimachi|WD=Q334076|lt=Emperor Ōgimachi}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|en|Emperor Go-Yōzei|WD=Q349440|lt=Emperor Go-Yōzei}}
{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|en|Toyotomi Hideyori|WD=Q313641|lt=Toyotomi Hideyori}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579622}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|Kuge|en|Kuge|WD=Q1196276|lt=Kuge}} and {{ill|Onmyōji|en|Onmyōji|WD=Q2274163|lt=onmyōji}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|en|Sengoku period|WD=Q204023|lt=Sengoku period}} through the {{ill|Azuchi–Momoyama period|en|Azuchi–Momoyama period|WD=Q319531|lt=Azuchi-Momoyama period}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|en|Kirishitan|WD=Q718714|lt=Kirishitan}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luís Fróis|en|Luís Fróis|WD=Q553687|lt=Luis Frois}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史|1=history of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q130436}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|en|1560|WD=Q6613|lt=1560}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|en|Bungo Province|WD=Q864148|lt=Bungo Province}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|en|1577|WD=Q6704|lt=1577}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luís Fróis|en|Luís Fróis|WD=Q553687|lt=Luis Frois}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspar Vilela|en|Gaspar Vilela|WD=Q11295956|lt=Gaspard Vilela}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:賀茂在昌]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}} [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|en|1577|WD=Q6704|lt=1577}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luís Fróis|en|Luís Fróis|WD=Q553687|lt=Luis Frois}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspar Vilela|en|Gaspar Vilela|WD=Q11295956|lt=Gaspard Vilela}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:賀茂在昌]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}} [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:pages]]

{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|en|Toyotomi Hideyori|WD=Q313641|lt=Toyotomi Hideyori|1=Toyotomi Hideyori}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579622|1=Q135579622}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|Kuge|en|Kuge|WD=Q1196276|lt=Kuge|1=Kuge}} and {{ill|Onmyōji|en|Onmyōji|WD=Q2274163|lt=onmyōji|1=Onmyōji}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|en|Sengoku period|WD=Q204023|lt=Sengoku period|1=Sengoku period}} through the {{ill|Azuchi–Momoyama period|en|Azuchi–Momoyama period|WD=Q319531|lt=Azuchi-Momoyama period|1=Azuchi–Momoyama period}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|en|Kirishitan|WD=Q718714|lt=Kirishitan|1=Kirishitan}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luís Fróis|en|Luís Fróis|WD=Q553687|lt=Luis Frois|1=Luís Fróis}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史|1=History of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q130436}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|en|1560|WD=Q6613|lt=1560|1=1560}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|en|Bungo Province|WD=Q864148|lt=Bungo Province|1=Bungo Province}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599|1=1599}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|en|1577|WD=Q6704|lt=1577|1=1577}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599|1=1599}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luís Fróis|en|Luís Fróis|WD=Q553687|lt=Luis Frois|1=Luís Fróis}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspar Vilela|en|Gaspar Vilela|WD=Q11295956|lt=Gaspard Vilela|1=Gaspar Vilela}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:賀茂在昌]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}} [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:pages]]

{{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} → {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (→ {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|en|Toyotomi Hideyori|WD=Q313641|lt=Toyotomi Hideyori|1=Toyotomi Hideyori}}) | clan = {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}} | father = {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} | siblings = Akimasa, adoptive sons: {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akitaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja|メルショル (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Melchior (Kamo clan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579622|1=Q135579622}}, {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} }} '''Kamo no Akimasa''' (賀茂 在昌) was a {{ill|Kuge|en|Kuge|WD=Q1196276|lt=Kuge|1=Kuge}} and {{ill|Onmyōji|en|Onmyōji|WD=Q2274163|lt=onmyōji|1=Onmyōji}} active during the {{ill|Sengoku period|en|Sengoku period|WD=Q204023|lt=Sengoku period|1=Sengoku period}} through the {{ill|Azuchi–Momoyama period|en|Azuchi–Momoyama period|WD=Q319531|lt=Azuchi-Momoyama period|1=Azuchi–Momoyama period}}. He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|en|Kirishitan|WD=Q718714|lt=Kirishitan|1=Kirishitan}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luís Fróis|en|Luís Fróis|WD=Q553687|lt=Luis Frois|1=Luís Fróis}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史|1=History of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q130436}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|en|1560|WD=Q6613|lt=1560|1=1560}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|en|Bungo Province|WD=Q864148|lt=Bungo Province|1=Bungo Province}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599|1=1599}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|en|1577|WD=Q6704|lt=1577|1=1577}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599|1=1599}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luís Fróis|en|Luís Fróis|WD=Q553687|lt=Luis Frois|1=Luís Fróis}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspar Vilela|en|Gaspar Vilela|WD=Q11295956|lt=Gaspard Vilela|1=Gaspar Vilela}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11400104}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:賀茂在昌]] {{wikidata link|Q73111790}} [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

He was baptized as a {{ill|Kirishitan|en|Kirishitan|qid=Q718714|lt=Kirishitan|1=Kirishitan}} under the name '''Manoel (Manoel Aqui Marza)'''. == Unresolved Matters == Akimasa's historical records are limited, leaving many details about his life unclear. === Adoption and Name Issues === Akimasa was the son of {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11400104}} of the {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo clan|qq=}} {{ill|Kaga no Kōji family|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji family|qq=}}, but it remains uncertain whether he officially succeeded the family headship. === Kirishitan Onmyōji === Akimasa is notable for being a Kirishitan onmyōji. Historical sources such as {{ill|Luís Fróis|en|Luís Fróis|qid=Q553687|lt=Luis Frois|1=Luís Fróis}}' {{ill|History of Japan|ja|日本史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Japan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の歴史|1=History of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q130436}} refer to "Aquimasadono," a high-Ranking astrologer and court noble, thought to correspond to Kamo no Akimasa. == Biography == === Early Life === Akimasa was born into the Kamo clan, a lineage traditionally tasked with the responsibilities of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}, particularly in calendar and astronomical practices. === Conversion to Christianity === In {{ill|1560|en|1560|qid=Q6613|lt=1560|1=1560}}, Akimasa encountered Jesuit missionaries, leading to his baptism as Manoel. He later relocated to {{ill|Bungo Province|en|Bungo Province|qid=Q864148|lt=Bungo Province|1=Bungo Province}} with his family, where he became involved with the Christian community. === Return to Kyoto === After years in Kyushu, Akimasa returned to Kyoto, where he resumed his court duties. He received several court promotions, ultimately attaining the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. === Later Years and Death === Akimasa died in {{ill|1599|en|1599|qid=Q6803|lt=1599|1=1599}} at the age of 80 or 81. His son {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja|勘解由小路在信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Akinobu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is thought to have succeeded him briefly before the family's eventual decline. == Cultural Appearances == * '''Video Games:''' Featured in "Oni Musha Soul" and "Sengoku Asuka ZERO." * '''Literature:''' Depicted in historical novels like *Cross of the Onmyōji*. == Honors and Titles == * {{ill|1577|en|1577|qid=Q6704|lt=1577|1=1577}}: Junior Fifth Rank * {{ill|1599|en|1599|qid=Q6803|lt=1599|1=1599}}: Junior Fourth Rank == References == * {{ill|Luís Fróis|en|Luís Fróis|qid=Q553687|lt=Luis Frois|1=Luís Fróis}}, *History of Japan* * {{ill|Gaspar Vilela|en|Gaspar Vilela|qid=Q11295956|lt=Gaspard Vilela|1=Gaspar Vilela}}, *Jesuit Annual Letters* == See Also == * {{ill|Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|ja|勘解由小路在富|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga no Kōji Aritomi|1=Kadenokōji Aritomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11400104}} * {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} * {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|1=Christian daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10917040}} {{translated page|ja|賀茂在昌|version=100764453|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{wikidata link|Q73111790|ja|賀茂在昌}} [[Category:1519 births]] [[Category:1520 births]] [[Category:1599 deaths]] [[Category:Court Nobles of the Muromachi and Azuchi–Momoyama Periods]] [[Category:Kadenokōji family]] [[Category:Kamo no Asomi Clan]] [[Category:Kirishitan]] [[Category:Onmyōji]] [[Category:Recipients of Lower Junior Fourth Rank]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
